name: USP消音版 | 次时代
descriptionEn: A fan favorite from Counter-Strike Source, the Silenced USP Pistol has a detachable silencer that gives shots less recoil while suppressing attention-getting noise. It has been given discreet red highlights to give off a futuristic feel. Imogen was the past Felix, I'm the future - Huxley, The Competition
descriptionZh: 从《反恐精英：起源》中穿越而来，是玩家们的最爱，消音版 USP 手枪装有一个可拆卸的消音器，降低后坐力的同时还能抑制住容易引起注意的枪声。 这把武器上有着不起眼的红色亮点，从而散发出一股未来的感觉。 伊莫金已经是过去了，费利克斯，我才是未来 - 竞争者赫胥黎
